Pakistan's star javelin thrower, Arshad Nadeem, received a hero's welcome upon returning home from the Paris Olympics. The 27-year-old was the first individual athlete to win a gold medal for Pakistan at the Summer Games. In an exclusive interview with CGTN, Nadeem vowed to continue making Pakistan proud with his exploits.
